name: Capital One Savor Cash Rewards for Good Credit
title: Capital One Savor Cash Rewards for Good Credit (Capital One)
text:
Card: Capital One Savor Cash Rewards for Good Credit (Capital One)
BEST FOR EARNING WITH BONUS CATEGORIES 
Pros: Earning unlimited 3% cash back on dining, entertainment, popular streaming services and at grocery stores (excluding superstores, like Walmart and Target) is a great return for a no-annual-fee credit card,This card is better for beginners since it’s easier to be approved for than the Capital One Savor Rewards Credit Card
Cons: No sign-up bonus or intro APR offer
Why we chose it: The Capital One Savor Cash Rewards for Good Credit serves as a great introduction to the world of rewards credit cards. For starters, there’s no annual fee, so you’ll rest easy knowing that you’re at an automatic net positive by opening this card. From there, earn 3% on four popular everyday spending categories, redeeming for valuable cash-back rewards back in your pocket. If you travel internationally from time to time, you can even bring this card with you, as there are no foreign transaction fees.
Who it's good for: This card is best for those with good credit who are looking to earn more for spending in the bonus categories this card comes with, which includes dining, entertainment, popular streaming services and at grocery stores. You can get an unlimited 3% cash back within these categories and 1% cash back on all other purchases.
Annual fee: $0
Rewards: 1 - 8% cash-back
APR: N/A,N/A,28.99% (Variable),28.99% (Variable),None,28.99% (Variable)
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/credit-cards/capital-one/
